scripts.copy: cp src/main/resources/index.html src/main/resources/style.css target/scala-2.13/scalajs-bundler/main/ && cp -r src/main/resources/logos target/scala-2.13/scalajs-bundler/main/ && echo '✅ Assets copied'
scripts.stop: lsof -ti:8080 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null && echo '🛑 Server stopped' || echo 'No server on port 8080'
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run copy && echo '\n✅ Build complete — serving on http://localhost:8080\n' && npm run serve
scripts.restart: npm run stop && npm run copy && npm run serve
scripts.dev: npm run stop && npm run build && npm run copy && npm run serve
